expectations.evidence: answer.md lists bg-slate-800, bg-slate-800/80, bg-gray-800/50, bg-blue-900/30. example-slide.md uses bg-slate-800/80, bg-blue-900/30, bg-green-900/30, bg-purple-900/30, bg-orange-900/30.
answer.md documents rounded-lg, rounded-xl and shadow-lg, shadow-xl with tables. example-slide.md uses rounded-xl + shadow-xl on all cards.
answer.md section 3 shows v-click on individual cards with three methods (basic, forward:delay, v-motion). example-slide.md applies v-click to every individual card div across all 5 patterns.
example-slide.md has complete frontmatter (theme: default, title, transition: fade), --- slide separators, and 5 copy-pasteable slide patterns.

answer.md has dedicated section '4. 다크 모드 대응' explaining dark: prefix usage (dark:bg-slate-800/80, dark:border-gray-700). example-slide.md pattern 5 demonstrates light/dark dual-mode cards with dark: prefix classes.
answer.md lists p-4, p-6, px-6 py-4, mt-4, gap-4 with pixel values. example-slide.md uses p-5, p-6, gap-4, gap-5, mt-4, mt-6 throughout.
